sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114654" key="xrhsmago/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρησμ-ᾰγόρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114654.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">utterer of oracles,</tr_> of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
